description: Triggers when user wants to optimize signup, registration, account creation, or trial activation flows
should_trigger: Optimize my signup form to improve conversions
My free trial signup has a high dropoff rate
Reduce friction in my registration flow
Which fields should I require in my account creation form?
Improve my B2B SaaS trial signup conversion
My signup form completion rate is only 20%
should_not_trigger: Optimize my contact form for lead generation
Improve my checkout flow for ecommerce
How do I onboard new users after signup?
